prompt: A surreal architectural scene. Two separate staircases on opposite sides appear to ascend upward when viewed individually, with people walking upward on each. However, when seen together from a wider perspective, the overall structure forms a continuous downward slope leading into a lower central area. The environment is realistic but slightly uncanny, with consistent lighting and perspective. The geometry subtly contradicts itself. No text, no symbols, no diagrams.
visual_logic: Each staircase locally appears to ascend, but together they form a descending structure, showing how local trends reverse when combined.
